Lara, your trusted AI-powered translation service, is now available in your browser. Translate effortlessly across 200+ languages!

Requires a Lara account. Login or signup to get started — free and paid plans available.

---

Built on the same translation technology used by professional translators worldwide, Lara delivers context-aware, native-quality translations across 200+ languages, directly inside your browser.

No copy-paste. No switching tabs. No compromises.

---

🚀 Features

✔️ Translate where you work
Translate selected text or entire pages instantly. Edit and replace translations directly inside emails, documents, and web apps.

✔️ Translate full documents
Upload .docx, .pdf, .pptx and more. Lara preserves layout and formatting while delivering a clean, ready-to-share translation.

✔️ Seamless integrations
Works natively inside the tools you already use:
- Gmail;
- Google Docs;
- Google Slides;
- and any website.
No interruptions, no switching apps — just smooth translation.

✔️ Incognito Mode for Translations
Choose how Lara learns from your translations. With Incognito Mode, your activity is not used to improve your personal translation memory or learning features. Perfect for sensitive content, one-off tasks, or when you want full control over your data.

✔️ Professional translation tools
Improve consistency and quality with features used by professional translators:
- Glossary management – enforce consistent terminology;
- Translation memory – reuse previous translations;
- Style and tone control – match your voice and writing style.

---

📌 Subscription

Lara is free to start. Upgrade to any paid plan for higher limits and advanced features. Subscriptions renew monthly and can be managed anytime from your account.

Happy translating!

Discover more:
👉 https://laratranslate.com

iManage File Transfer enables knowledge workers to upload and download documents seamlessly between any website and iManage.

Knowledge workers are frequently required to share documents with third-parties by uploading them to a website. They are also provided with a set of documents which they need to save to iManage Work. With the iManage File Transfer extension, users can seamlessly transfer sensitive files between iManage Work and third-party websites. 

Using iManage File Transfer improves security and compliance as it makes sure that the company documents are saved to iManage Work instead of users’s devices. 

Note: To use iManage File Transfer, you will need a valid iManage Work at cloudimanage.com account and license. Contact your iManage Account Executive for more information.
Email Extractor - Pro Email Scraper from Carryfest
Extract emails from web pages, links, texts, social media, and wherever you want!

Email Extractor - Pro Email Scraper from Carryfest is a powerful and user-friendly browser extension designed to simplify the process of extracting email addresses from web pages. Whether you're gathering contacts for your business, research, or networking, Oimi Email Extractor streamlines the task, saving you time and effort.

Key Features That Set Email Extractor - Pro Email Scraper from Carryfest Apart:
1. Auto-Scan Web Pages: Auto-scan any web page for emails.
2. CSV Export: Export collected emails in CSV format.
3. TXT Export: Export collected emails in TXT format.
4. Save to Dashboard: Save emails to dashboard and filter from there. You can also export your emails from dashboard.
5. Duplicate Filter: Cleanup duplicates and export the unique ones only.

How to Use:
1. Add to Chrome: Add this extension to your Chrome browser from the Chrome Web Store.
2. Visit a Web Page: Visit your desired web page and open the extension.
3. Choose Export Format: Export extracted emails as CSV or TXT files with just a click, adapting to your workflow.
4. Save to Dashboard: Keep your email collection organized and secure by saving directly within this extension.
5. Filter Duplicates: Let this extension optimize your list by effortlessly removing duplicate entries.

Privacy:
Rest easy knowing that Email Extractor - Pro Email Scraper from Carryfest operates locally on your device. Your data is processed with the utmost privacy and security, ensuring that your valuable information remains confidential. However, we do not store any emails collected by you.

Upgrade your email discovery experience with Email Extractor - Pro Email Scraper from Carryfest, where efficiency meets simplicity, and your contact lists reach new heights!

Jarvis - Your Smart ChatGPT AI Assistant
Browse Smarter with Jarvis ChatGPT AI Extension! Select content & Get Relevant Information, Summarize, Write Replies & Much more!

Introducing Jarvis - Your Smart AI Assistant powered by ChatGPT that is going to revolutionize the way you interact with online content!

🚀 GETTING STARTED
Launch Jarvis by using any of the following option:
1️⃣ Simply Select Any Online Text Content, which brings up the Jarvis custom menu to choose from.
2️⃣ Or, Press Ctrl+J to start chatting with Jarvis.

KEY BENEFITS
⭐ FREE access to the power of ChatGPT! 
⭐ Summarize selected articles and other long-form content.
⭐ Get More Information about any topic of interest.
⭐ Create replies to emails, social media posts, and anything else, saving you time and enhancing productivity.
⭐ Ask any question and get instant answers, making it really easy to find the information you need.

HOW JARVIS WORKS
  ➡️ Simply Select Any Online Content, which brings up the Jarvis custom menu.
  ➡️ Choose any Command from Menu (Summarize, Get More Info, Generate Reply, etc) 
  ➡️ Jarvis pops up with relevant answer. Continue to chat with Jarvis if needed.

FAQs
  ➡️ Is Jarvis Free?
  Yes! There is a free version of Jarvis.
  
  ➡️ Can I turn off Jarvis for selected websites?
  Absolutely! Just click the Jarvis extension from the Chrome extensions list and select the 'Disable Jarvis for this Website' checkbox setting.

📧 CONTACT US
Please feel free to contact us at contact@smartupai.com or https://jarvis.smartupai.com/ 

🙏 THANK YOU! 
Jarvis is designed to be user-friendly and intuitive. Its seamless integration as a Chrome extension means you can effortlessly access its capabilities while you browse. Say goodbye to switching between tabs or opening additional apps. Jarvis becomes your trusted co-pilot, always ready to assist and enhance your online journey.

We believe that Jarvis has the potential to revolutionize the way people interact with the web, and we're eager for your help and feedback.

Thank you so much for your support!
Amazonインボイスダウンローダー

AmazonBusinessには対応しておりません。AmazonBuisinessはAmazonBuisinessが提供するCSVダウンロードなどを利用ください。

2024.02.08 追加
取得結果画面にCSVダウンロード機能をβ版として設置しました。…

AmazonBusinessには対応しておりません。AmazonBuisinessはAmazonBuisinessが提供するCSVダウンロードなどを利用ください。

2024.02.08 追加
取得結果画面にCSVダウンロード機能をβ版として設置しました。
取得する項目は以下です。 

EC名、注文日、注文番号、商品名(ASIN)※、合計金額、適格番号/支払い明細、ファイル名
※最大5件まで、商品ごとに「::」で区切られます

2024.01.31追加
PDF取得時、年月ごとにPDFにまとめZIPでダウンロードするオプションを設けました。

2024.01.26追加
アマゾンアカウントの収集はしておりません。
複数のアマゾンアカウントを切り替えてデータ取得された場合、アマゾンアカウントと購入履歴の紐づけを行っていないため、全ての履歴が混ざって表示される仕様でございます。ご了承ください。

2024.01.22追加
拡張機能のアイコンクリックし「amazonの取得履歴ページを開くボタン」押下で履歴ページに遷移後、履歴ぺージから最大5件PDFを1つのPDFにまとめて出力する機能を追加しました。

インボイスに伴い、Amazonの注文履歴ページに表示されている注文商品の適格請求書か支払い明細のPDFを一括ダウンロードします。
年単位での指定も可能ですが、履歴数が多い場合は「年単位のデータ取得」と「ダウンロード各々」に時間が結構かかります。

一括ダウンロード後、取得結果画面にて注文番号ごとに取得したPDFが「適格請求書（インボイス対応）」か「支払い明細（インボイス非対応）」かどうかを一覧で確認できます。同時にPDFの再ダウンロードも可能です。
取得したPDFが「支払い明細」であった場合、販売者へ注文番号ベースでAmazonのチャット問い合わせリンクとAmazon上の販売者ページのリンクを自動生成します。

なお、現状において特にデジタルコンテンツに多いですが注文内にインボイス対応と非対応の購入が混在した場合は、適格請求書として判定してしまうため予めご了承ください。

最後に、Amazonの仕様変更により突然利用できなくなることもありますので、その際はご了承のほどよろしくお願い致します。

Amazon
適格請求書
Amazon一括ダウンロード

Collect online evidence in a faster, safer and easier way!

Defamation, bullying, fake news or others?
Download our plugin for free on a Chrome browser and collect evidence at any time, anywhere.

The solution Proof of Authenticity for Web Content makes a full copy of the content being viewed on your browser and automatically generates a report proving its existence. It is possible to register the authenticity of content published on the web, be it on websites, blogs, social media platforms or portals. Additionally, from the report, a hash - a unique and exclusive code - is calculated, which identifies your document on our website.  

For that, we use the most advanced technology: the blockchain. With a register on blockchain, it is possible to prove that the evidence was not modified, with the content being preserved even if the original publication is deleted. It has also an additional lawyer of protection with the timestamp, which indicates the precise date and time that the evidence was collected. 

RECOMMENDATIONS:

- The plugin can only be installed on Chrome browser. After the installation, we recommend that you reload the browser or the tabs with the content you want to collect.

- In the case of social media, try to use the link to the specific post.

- To use the plugin, simply click on the extension icon, which can be found on the top right corner of your browser.


ATTENTION: Some plugins might try to prevent PACWeb from running, so we suggest that you DEACTIVATE all the extensions on your browser before using it. Check also the LANGUAGE OF YOUR BROWSER to make sure that the report is generated in the language you need.
The report generated by our plugin will only have LEGAL VALIDITY if certified on our platform.


- After collecting the content, a PDF file is generated, which will be automatically downloaded to your computer, and from which a hash is calculated on the OriginalMy website.

- In order for the PDF to be valid as proof of authenticity, it is necessary to certify its hash on blockchain or authenticate the copy of the web page at the notary. Both can be done through our platform, with administrative fees to be paid. 

- In the case of Notarial Authentication, the content collected must be public so that it can be accessed by the notary. Please note that this is valid only in Brazil.

- After payment, you can go to the OriginalMy website and submit the PDF file to check the certification status.

This tool is intended as a mechanism to collect additional evidence for court proceedings. Its legal validity is assured in Brazil, so please refer to your lawyer to inquire about the validity in your country. 

OriginalMy is a platform for the authenticity of files and documents, people and signatures, connected to four public blockchains: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Ethereum Classic and DeCred.

Gain Connect functionality through Google Chrome™

MiCloud Connect for Chrome™ browser delivers a seamless unified communications experience between MiCloud Connect, Google Chrome and G Suite.
 
Key benefits of the MiCloud Connect browser extension with G Suite integration include:
 
• Easily search for contacts, view their presence and place a call from the Chrome web browser
• Transfer calls directly or after speaking with a contact with blind and consultative options 
• Listen to voicemails and save or delete them  
• Quickly create and join MiCloud Connect events from Google calendar 
• Web conferencing notifications and quick join
 
MiCloud Connect for Chrome is available only for MiCloud Connect customers in North America.  The already existing Mitel Connect for Chrome will remain to serve MiCloud Connect customers in the UK, MiCloud Connect customers in Australia, and all MiVoice Connect customers worldwide.

You must have an existing Mitel Connect Cloud  account to use this extension. Don’t have an account? Contact us for more information. This extension can be used with or without a G Suite account.

A lightweight analytics plugin that helps you track and analyze your team's performance metrics directly from Jira boards.

To get started, click the “Analyze Metrics” button on your Kanban board in Jira.

If the button doesn’t appear, open your Kanban board in Jira and simply click the Jira Metrics Plugin icon in your browser’s extensions menu — your board will open automatically in the plugin.

Key Features:

✨ Advanced Analytics Reports
- Cycle Time Histogram with percentile analysis
- Throughput report with trends and patterns
- Aging Chart for work in progress
- Cumulative Flow Diagram (CFD)

🔍 Deep Task Analysis
- Direct links to Jira tasks from reports
- Detailed breakdowns of time spent in each column
- Historical data analysis
- Percentile trend tracking

🔒 Enhanced Security & Privacy
- Works locally in your browser
- No sensitive data storage
- Only tracks task movement timestamps
- Completely anonymous data processing
- No access to task content or personal information

⚡ Easy Setup & Use
- Quick installation as a Chrome extension
- No server configuration needed
- Works with both Jira Cloud and Jira Server
- Automatic integration with your Jira boards
- Instant access to analytics

Perfect For
- Project Managers seeking data-driven insights

- Process improvement initiatives
- Team leads monitoring workflow efficiency
- Organizations focused on continuous improvement

Benefits

- Save time on manual reporting

Compatible With

- All Chromium-based browsers

Enhance Privacy and Security by Automatically Blurring Pages

This extension will automatically blur chrome screens.  There are two modes to choose from.  When set to timer mode, you can select how many minutes of inactivity to wait before blurring the screen.  When set to hover mode, the screen will automatically blur when your mouse leaves the page. 

Privacy Screen and Security Blur is great for legal, healthcare, and other professionals who deal with sensitive data.

It's also great for everyday users that just want to protect their privacy.

Stackable is a home screen for your browser. It's the best way to manage your bookmarks and tabs.

We help you find your content…

Stackable is a home screen for your browser. It's the best way to manage your bookmarks and tabs.

We help you find your content and files super fast. Just open up a new tab in your browser. 

Stackable reimagines the way we organize bookmarks, manage tabs and search for things.

Features

1) Home screen
Just like your mobile phone's home screen that links you to all your apps, Stackable is a home screen for your browser. Open up a new tab and you'll see all your bookmarks and open tabs in one place. It's so much easier to find what you need!

2) Drag and drop bookmarks
Everything in Stackable is drag and drop friendly! Organize your bookmarks into Stacks and move them around however you like.

3) Open 100 bookmarks instantly
Always need to open the same links? Save them into a Stack and open all of them with one-click.

4) Powerfully manage open tabs
View all your open tabs in one place. Quickly bookmark, rearrange tabs, go to tabs and close tabs.

5) Search for anything anywhere
Launch the Stackable command bar on any webpage to quickly access your bookmarks, tabs and history.

6) Share bookmarks with anyone
Team dashboards? New employee onboarding? Reading list? Share them all with a link.

7) Free forever
Stackable was created to make your web browsing super efficient. It will always be free to use for individuals. We will never limit the number of bookmarks or tabs you have.

Optimize Amazon and Walmart sales with real-time data insights. Make smarter decisions now to boost your business performance.

Maximize your Amazon and Walmart selling potential with Sellify.

Sellify is the Chrome extension built for serious marketplace sellers, including Amazon FBA, Amazon FBM, Walmart WFS, and Walmart MFN. It gives you clear data, accurate estimates, and fast insights so you can focus on profitable products instead of guesswork.

Sellify provides the data and infrastructure needed to find Walmart and Amazon opportunities across Wholesale, Online Arbitrage, Retail Arbitrage, and Private Label.

Key Features

Detailed Analytics
Gain in-depth insights into product profitability. Our extension provides scenario analysis, offering a clear view of potential outcomes based on different strategies. With accurate fee breakdowns and calculations, you can understand all costs involved, ensuring precise profit estimations.

Accurate Estimated Sales
View clean estimated sales for Amazon and Walmart to understand demand, plan inventory, and prioritize higher impact products.

Advanced Seller Table and Insights
Break down the competition with our seller table. Check stock levels, seller history, and how often sellers rotate in and out so you can judge how stable or aggressive the competition really is.

Competitor Overview
See who is selling the item, how many sellers you are up against, and what their pricing looks like. Use this to decide when to enter, when to pass, and how to price confidently.

Market Analytics Across Channels
Compare products on Amazon, Walmart, eBay, Google, and other major retailers. Spot gaps in pricing, availability, and demand to uncover new sourcing ideas.

AI Powered Smart Matcher
Match products across Walmart and Amazon with AI support. Get a clear view of how an item performs on each marketplace using rich data that is ready to act on.

Historical Market Data
Review average prices and key trends over ranges like 90 days and 180 days. Use real history instead of hunches when making buying and pricing decisions.

Advanced Product data
View important product details such as model number, UPC, and manufacturer information so you can verify matches and vet deals quickly.

Online Arbitrage Sourcing
Use the Sellify Product Explorer to discover profitable products while you browse online retailers. Scan through large catalogs and send the winners straight into your workflow.

Additional Features

Google Sheets Exporting for Lead Generation
Send items straight into Google Sheets with one click. Reorder or hide columns, add notes, and manage leads the way you want. Your data stays in your sheet, fully organized and easy to work with over time.

Profitability Analysis
Track and review the profit potential of your items and focus your time and capital on the products that actually move the needle.

Accurate Fee Calculation
See clear fee breakdowns for Walmart and Amazon so you understand your true costs, including for Amazon FBA.

Comprehensive Seller Insights
Understand how crowded a listing is, how stocked competitors are, and how that may affect your chances at the Buy Box or top offers.

Smart Market Comparison
Compare pricing and demand across platforms to decide where each item fits best in your portfolio.

Advanced Buy Box Intelligence
Monitor Buy Box status, pricing signals, and suppression alerts so you can adjust strategy before you lose important placement.

Multi Functional Tools
Use built in AI tools to cut down the time you spend on research, matching, and manual checks.

Catalog Integration
Add items straight from the extension into your catalog or system. Keep your sourcing, analysis, and workflow connected in one place.
